Table of Contents

Enum esriGeometryAttributes

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

The set of attributes that a geometry can have.

[Guid("7DB5F456-92F0-485B-ABB5-42F9EC65D14E")]
public enum esriGeometryAttributes

Fields

esriAttributeAll = 255

255: Any/all attributes.

esriAttributeID = 16

16: The vertex identifier (ID, PointID) attribute.

esriAttributeM = 64

64: The measure (M) attribute.

esriAttributeNone = 0

0: No attribute.

esriAttributeNormal = 8

8: The surface Normal attribute (Multipatch-specific).

esriAttributeTexture = 4

4: The surface Texture attribute (Multipatch-specific).

esriAttributeZ = 128

128: The height (Z) attribute.
